prompt:
Create a vertical full-body studio fashion editorial photo of a young East Asian man with styled dark textured hair, calm neutral expression, looking directly into the camera. He is leaning naturally against a tall, slim black metal barstool, one foot on the floor and the other leg bent with the foot resting on the stool support.

Wardrobe and styling: a light dusty blue oversized crewneck sweatshirt layered over a crisp white collared button-down shirt, with the white collar and shirt hem clearly visible. Matching light dusty blue jogger sweatpants. Chunky cream and white athletic sneakers with black laces and subtle gray accents. Add minimal polished styling, clean skin, and a contemporary K-fashion editorial feel.

Scene and lighting: seamless light gray to off-white studio backdrop, soft even commercial studio lighting, minimal shadows, airy high-end catalog mood, refined pastel color palette.

Composition and quality: eye-level camera angle, sharp focus, full body visible, balanced negative space, polished fashion photography, vertical framing, ultra-detailed, 8k.
